logs.message: Detected package version outside of dependency constraint: Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Connectors.OpenAI 1.38.0 requires OpenAI (= 2.2.0-beta.1) but version OpenAI 2.9.1 was resolved.
Package 'Microsoft.SemanticKernel.Core' 1.38.0 has a known critical severity vulnerability, https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2ww3-72rp-wpp4
